properties.displayName: T1563.002 - Lateral Movement via RDP Hijacking
properties.description: Detects multiple RDP sessions from a single account, indicating potential session hijacking.
properties.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4624 and LogonType == 10 | summarize RemoteSessions = dcount(IpAddress) by Computer, Account | where RemoteSessions > 1

properties.displayName: T1543.003 - Persistence via New Service Creation
properties.description: Detects the creation of a new system service, a common persistence mechanism for malware.
properties.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4697 | extend ServiceName = RenderedDescription | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ServiceName
